generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that many communities still lack basic emergency preparedness plans? While some argue for more civil defense funding, we've seen how bureaucratic delays can leave families vulnerable. Remember the 2024 Midwest blackouts? Local responders were overwhelmed because federal preparedness programs were underfunded and slow to mobilize. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act - but we also can't trust that top-down solutions will work. Community-led preparedness makes more sense than expensive government programs that don't deliver when we need them most. #CivilDefense #CommunityFirst
